name: Can You Sue Employer for Forklift Accident in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for a forklift accident in West Valley City UT if they were negligent?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer for a forklift accident in West Valley City UT if they were negligent?

acceptedAnswer.text: Generally no—Utah workers' comp is exclusive remedy barring intentional acts or employer fraud. Third-party suits possible against equipment makers or other drivers if negligence caused accident.

suggestedAnswer.text: Workers' comp exclusivity protects employers from lawsuits for job injuries like forklift tip-overs. Exceptions rare (e.g., assault by employer). Pursue third-party claims separately for extra damages (pain/suffering). In West Valley City's industrial zones, faulty pallet jacks or untrained spotters often create manufacturer liability—dual representation maximizes recovery.
